Video.summary: Kassi is here because she can't believe that her ex-boyfriend left her for their roommate. Then it's a sister show down when these two go head to head for the love of the same man. Plus, Bryan's girlfriend Brandy is here to tell him a secret.
Video.title: Triple Ex!

Video.summary: Gail needs more excitement in her life so shes been sleeping with her boyfriend's best friend! Next Dave finds out that his girlfriend of 3 years is having an affair. He says he's willing to do anything to get her back; even wear her bra!
Video.title: Freaky Sex Stories

Video.summary: Chris is here today to tell his girlfriend, Chrissy, about his sexual fetish. Next we meet Mistress Tara, the dominatrix who caters to Chris' fantasy. We'll watch him pretend to be a dog.
Video.title: My Day As A Dog!

Video.summary: Demetrius cheated on Aleesha with her sister Keshia and also a stripper named Natalie. Then, Kahari's here to reveal to his girlfriend Jasmine that not only is he bi-sexual, but he's also been cheating on he with a transsexual named.
Video.title: Transtastic Confessions

Video.summary: A woman sleeps with her brother; a woman leaves her controlling husband; a woman sleeps with her husband's sister; a man impregnates his mistress.
Video.title: My Brother Is My Lover

Video.summary: Fists fly when Cee Cee proposes to her boyfriend on the show; old flames come out of the woodwork to profess their love for Summer; Jon confesses a shocking secret to the woman he wants to marry.
Video.title: Half-Baked Proposals

Video.summary: Rashelle's here to find out how close Jessica and Richard have really become. Then, Sean says that his dream is to marry his fiancee Jessica by the lake. But before the couple takes the plunge, he's got to get some secrets off of his chest
Video.title: Big Blow Offs

Video.summary: Jamie is here today to confront her mother and they do indeed face off over Mom's bad behavior. Then Karla and Tiffany have a secret to confess to their respective husbands ... they're sleeping together!
Video.title: I'll Never Forgive You!

Video.summary: Tim doesn't know if he wants to be with Desiree, his wife and mother of his daughter, or Victoria his gorgeous coworker and Mistress. Then, Olivia is here because she's sick and tired of her husband Fred's cheating ways.
Video.title: Saucy Mistresses

Video.summary: Josh and Amy will find out today that their partners have been unfaithful. Next Madeline reveals to Andre that she's been sleeping with Diante. Then Quincy is engaged to Callie but what Callie doesn't know is that Quincy has been cheating with Amy.
Video.title: Invasion of the Angry Lovers

Video.summary: Shawna and her cousin, Amy, were friends until Amy slept with Shawna's man, Jeremy.
Video.title: Your Ex Is A Nightmare!

Video.summary: Deciding what you want to be in life can be tough, but telling your loved ones you want to be a porn star can be even harder!
Video.title: Who Wants To Be A Porn Star

Image.alt: Who Wants To Be A Porn Star
Who Wants To Be A Porn Star
Who Wants To Be A Porn Star

Video.summary: Brady proposes to his ex-girlfriend, then she learns he cheated with her friend; Dillon feels he has to come clean about an advance he made toward his fiancee's friend.
Video.title: It Was a 1 Night Smash

Video.summary: James tells his fiancee that he's cheating with Melanie. Jewel and Christa compete for Mistress Shock's love!
Video.title: I Have Another Lover

Video.summary: Kim and Kristie are identical twins and Kristie is planning to marry Michael but there’s a catch. Later Louis has some explaining to do. His lover of 8 years has just informed his wife of their affair!
Video.title: My Twin Slept With My Man!

Image.alt: My Twin Slept With My Man!
My Twin Slept With My Man!
My Twin Slept With My Man!

Video.summary: Juice is here to reveal to Jessica that he’s a woman. Jolene has been sleeping with her sister’s girlfriend, Stephanie! Chante doesn’t approve of her sister’s fiancée and won’t hold her peace at their wedding!
Video.title: Lesbian Love Fest

Video.summary: Shantell decided that she needs to fix her relationship with Kenneth so she's going to tell her mistress that it's over. Then Dean says that he wants to take their relationship to the next level, but Kendra's here to let Dean in on a little secret.
Video.title: Lesbian and Gay Affairs Confessed

Video.summary: Tony admits to his girlfriend that he likes to dress in women's clothes and that he secretly has a boyfriend! Next James says his wife moved back home with him but she also brought her new boyfriend!
Video.title: Bisexual Betrayals

Video.summary: Athena is here to tell her fiancé that she is cheating, and that she poses nude on the Internet. Next Monica is cheating with her husband's best friend! Later Billy will admit to his girlfriend that he's been having an affair with her best friend.
Video.title: Sex Betrayals

Video.summary: Greg will reveal to his girlfriend, Deidra, that he secretly works as a gay, male escort. Next Madrina's boyfriend keeps cheating on her with his ex­. Then Ro-Ro has two girlfriends and today they'll force her to choose between them.
Video.title: Secret Sex Lives

Video.summary: Khloe is ready to reveal to that she may not be all the woman he thinks. Nick is here to confront his wife.
Video.title: I Regret You

Video.summary: Thomas' baby's mama and fiancee demand that he choose between them; Autumn reveals her true identity to a man who is interested in her; Alyse is blind-sided by her boyfriend's ruthless rejection.
Video.title: I'm Not His Cousin, I'm His Fiancee

Image.alt: I'm Not His Cousin, I'm His Fiancee
I'm Not His Cousin, I'm His Fiancee
I'm Not His Cousin, I'm His Fiancee

Video.summary: TiTi made a big mistake when she hooked up with her cousin's man Damo. Then, Ryan and Kristy are engaged, but Ryan says he wants to stop their upcoming nuptials because he slept with Kristy's sister Kayla.
Video.title: Men Show No Mercy

Video.summary: Strippers Precious and Jewels have too much in common; John learns that his friend is responsible for the downturn in his marriage; DJ's girlfriend wants to see other people.
Video.title: She Took My Man ... and My Car!

Image.alt: She Took My Man ... and My Car!
She Took My Man ... and My Car!
She Took My Man ... and My Car!

Video.summary: Tony is sleeping with his girlfriends best friend, Allen. Next Tammy’s fiancée, Ron, has no idea that she's been sleeping with her best friend, Autumn. Later Jan’s lovers, Russ and Ian, find out that Jan has yet another romantic interest in her life.
Video.title: I'm Having A Bi-Sexual Affair

Video.summary: Jerry visits the homeless of New York who live beneath the city in the vast network of tunnels.
Video.title: The Mole People

Video.summary: Daphne is messing with her daughter's man but he loves Wendy! Jenna cheated due to her nagging man!
Video.title: I Stole My Daughter's Man

Video.summary: Sylvia loves one-night-stands and faces her angry sister Jackqueline for sleeping with her man! Then, Greg’s one-night stand left him doubting his long-term relationship!
Video.title: Feisty One Night Stands

Video.summary: Edwina slept with Mike, her godsister’s fiance! Robert’s man has been fantasizing about a woman named Morgan! Mimi will fight to keep her cheating man Trayl from her best friend Keisha!
Video.title: You've Been Caught!

Video.summary: A transgendered woman's boyfriend has a confession to make; Kelsey is ready to take her relationship off life support and get together with someone else; Samantha admits to hooking up with her friend's boyfriend.
Video.title: Slapped With the Truth

Video.summary: Jay admits to cheating on his girlfriend with a woman who wants to take it to the next level; Parail demands to know the truth about his baby-mama and his best friend; Sam has a list of reasons why he wants to break up with his fiancee.
Video.title: Snowed In Sex

Video.summary: Tiffany wants to escalate things with her workout partner, but he has eyes for a woman who is hiding her true identity; Sammie says he offered a woman sex instead of money when he lost a bet to her; Brianna has feelings for her pool-playing buddy.
Video.title: Sexercise Me
